# scalegrid_cloud_profile (Data Source)

Fetches a single ScaleGrid cloud profile by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Cloud profile (machine pool) ID. Either `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Cloud profile name. Either `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_type` (String) Cloud provider (e.g. AWS).
- `database` (String) Database engine the profile is for.
- `shared` (Boolean) Whether this is a shared (Dedicated plan) profile.
- `status` (String) Status of the cloud profile.
